TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ciyaw-i-pu, title = Ciyaw-i-pu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciyaw-i-pu} }

S.FORM: Ciyaw-i-pu U mikuwanay atu misiremuday tu sapasubana', matiya u milaylayay tu tireng atu sapatatudung tu kapay a tarakaway a seyhu, atu mikantukay tu i niyaniyaru'anay a pasubana' a sitatudungay a seyhu nu mita. Siremud han a patatudung, u milesimetay, u misiremuday tu sapasubana' atu papasubanaan a tarakaway a seyhu nu mita. Pi'arawan to lakaw 教育部全球資訊網
S.PHON: ʦijaw-i-po~u~u o~u~u miko~u~uwanaj ato~u~u misirəmo~u~uɬ~ɮaj to~u~u sapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ, matija o~u~u miɾajɾajaj to~u~u tirəŋ ato~u~u sapatato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u kapaj a tarakawaj a səjħo~u~u, ato~u~u mikanto~u~ukaj to~u~u i nijanijaro~u~uʡanaj a paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ a sitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj a səjħo~u~u no~u~u mita. sirəmo~u~uɬ~ɮ ħan a patato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ, o~u~u miɾəsimətaj, o~u~u misirəmo~u~uɬ~ɮaj to~u~u sapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ ato~u~u papaso~u~ub~b~vanaan a tarakawaj a səjħo~u~u no~u~u mita. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ********
S.FORM: Ciyaw-i-pu U mikuwanay atu misiremuday tu sapasubana', matiya u milaylayay tu tireng atu sapatatudung tu kapay a tarakaway a seyhu, atu mikantukay tu i niyaniyaru'anay a pasubana' a sitatudungay a seyhu nu mita. Siremud han a patatudung, u milesimetay, u misiremuday tu sapasubana' atu papasubanaan a tarakaway a seyhu nu mita. Pi'arawan to lakaw 教育部全球資訊網
S.PHON: ʦijaw-i-po~u~u o~u~u miko~u~uwanaj ato~u~u misirəmo~u~uɬ~ɮaj to~u~u sapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ, matija o~u~u miɾajɾajaj to~u~u tirəŋ ato~u~u sapatato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u kapaj a tarakawaj a səjħo~u~u, ato~u~u mikanto~u~ukaj to~u~u i nijanijaro~u~uʡanaj a paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ a sitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj a səjħo~u~u no~u~u mita. sirəmo~u~uɬ~ɮ ħan a patato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ, o~u~u miɾəsimətaj, o~u~u misirəmo~u~uɬ~ɮaj to~u~u sapaso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ ato~u~u papaso~u~ub~b~vanaan a tarakawaj a səjħo~u~u no~u~u mita. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ********
